stemHtml:
The tower provides the following ATC clearance:

"JETAIR 136 CLEARED TO BURY, VIA E40 FL280 BOLDEN 3 DELTA DEPARTURE, SQUAWK 5501"

What is the correct read back by the pilot?

options.a: VIA E40 FL280 BOLDEN 3 DELTA DEPARTURE, SQUAWK 5501 JETAIR 136.
options.b: CLEARED TO BURY, VIA ROUTE E40 FL280 BOLDEN 3DELTA STANDARD DEPARTURE JETAIR 136.
options.c: CLEARED TO BURY, VIA E40 FL280 BOLDEN 3 DELTA DEPARTURE, SQUAWK 5501 JETAIR 136.
